hero.name: Patrick Hennes
hero.tagline: Bridging health and technology — designing interfaces that feel as good as they look.

showcase.title: Selected Work
showcase.subtitle: A collection of projects where design meets healthcare and technology.

scoon.name: Scoon
scoon.description: The platform for photographers, videographers and creators searching for the best locations. Community-driven, curated spots — creators earn from their contributions. Built with Itanic & Kyri Agency.

amigon.name: Amigon
amigon.description: A mental health companion app with AI voice integration, built as a master's thesis project. Daily mood tracking, gentle voice journaling, and calm interaction design.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: This very site — designed and built to showcase my craft. Dark glassmorphism aesthetic with multilingual support.

dataflow.name: DataFlow
dataflow.description: A SaaS dashboard for real-time analytics with complex data visualisation, custom chart components, and role-based access.

gym.name: GymLog
gym.description: Fitness tracking app with personalised workout plans, progress analytics, and an intuitive dark-mode UI.

gymbook.name: GymBook
gymbook.description: Workout journal app for planning and tracking training sessions — clear, fast, and motivating by design.

pokedex.name: Pokédex
pokedex.description: A modern Pokédex app with fluid animations, detailed Pokémon profiles, and a thoughtfully designed search experience. University project at Inholland Hogeschool.

wearable.name: Wearable Dashboard
wearable.description: A health dashboard for wearable data, built in collaboration with StrykerLabs GmbH, Graz. Heart rate, sleep, and activity — cleanly visualised in a medical-grade interface.

anno.name: Anno Amsterdam
anno.description: AR tourism app for Amsterdam — explore building information through Augmented Reality and choose guided tours. Built with Inholland Hogeschool and Pieter Both.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: End-to-end product design and development — from first sketch to final build.

web.title: Full-Stack Web Development
web.description: From the initial concept to a scalable cloud solution. I develop modern, responsive web apps, dashboards, and SaaS products that shine both in the frontend and backend.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: High-performance apps that engage users. Whether native for iOS or cross-platform, I build tailored mobile experiences from conception to the App Store.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Aesthetics meet functionality. I craft pixel-perfect interfaces through thoughtful wireframes, interactive prototypes, and a clear user-centric focus.

performance.title: Performance & Security
performance.description: Secure, fast, and future-proof. My focus is on measurable top-tier performance, clean architecture, and strict adherence to privacy standards.

stack.title: Stack & Tools
stack.subtitle: The technologies and tools I work with every day.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The person behind the pixels.
about.bio1: I'm Patrick, 27, from Graz. Got into tech early and never really stopped. I discovered UI/UX during an Erasmus semester in the Netherlands — working on a big project for the city of Amsterdam — and that kind of changed everything.
about.bio2: Now I'm wrapping up my MSc in eHealth at FH Joanneum, building mobile apps in Swift, Kotlin and Flutter, and thinking a lot about how health and technology can actually work well together.
about.bio3: I use AI tools in basically everything I do — not as a shortcut, but because they genuinely make the work better and faster.

process.title: My Process
process.subtitle: From the first idea to the final launch — structured and transparent.

analyse.title: Analysis
analyse.description: We start with the core problem. Together we define clear goals, analyze your target audience, and lay the technical framework for the project.

design.title: Design
design.description: Ideas become visible. Through modern and interactive prototypes, we create an interface that doesn't just look amazing, but feels intuitive.

development.title: Development
development.description: Time to build. Focused on clean code and cutting-edge frameworks, I engineer a robust, high-performance architecture for your product.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Smooth liftoff. Beyond the initial go-live, I ensure deep optimizations and remain by your side even after a successful launch.

contact.title: Let's Build Something
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Drop me a message and let's see what we can create together.

form.timeline_label: When do you want to start?
form.name: Name
form.success_message: I'll get back to you within 24h.
